prompt.content: Create slides for the 3 branches of the govt while covering the main job and key parts of it. Add a slide with questions for each branch. We're currently going over the 3 branches of the government in the United States. I need you to edit and finish a slide deck. I will use the slides to present the initial information on the 3 branches of the government. Using the 3 branches of the government outlined in the article. Please finish the slideshow. Each slide should include the branch of the government, its main job, and the key parts of it. Make sure you use the article as a reference. I have included some blank slides; please use those slides to add the 3 branches of the government. Create one more slide for me. The last slide of the deck should include one question about each branch; these questions should come from the bulleted list in the article.
